events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We are asked to identify the component or condition and name visible defect cues. The scenario: structural bolting, turn-of-nut match marks absent or not rotated. This is a defect because RCSC Specification requires match marks for turn-of-nut method to verify proper tension. The work is rough-complete. So decision: fail (defective). Risk: high? Structural bolting failure can be critical, but since it's rough-complete and not yet closed out, maybe high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 90%? Rough-complete means installed but not closed out, so maybe 90. Value: none. Sound source: none. Confidence: high. Event time, rate: not applicable. Order: not applicable. Workable: maybe rework needed. Findings: "Turn-of-nut match marks absent or not rotated, indicating bolts may not be properly tensioned per RCSC." Actions: "Inspect all bolts, apply match marks, and re-tension as required." Rationale: "RCSC requires match marks to verify proper installation; absence indicates potential under-tensioning." References: "RCSC Specification Section 8.2 (Turn-of-nut method)."

So JSON output.
